subsections.title: Loan Tenure
subsections.content: The minimum repayment term is 1 month and the maximum repayment term is 12 months. The repayment (principal plus interest) must be completed within 365 days.

subsections.title: Interest Rates
subsections.content: The maximum Annual Percentage Rate (APR) is 26.90% per annum (Chola Welfare loan Scheme) for all CIFCL branches, excluding stamp duty (if applicable, as per state laws). T&C apply

subsections.title: Interest Calculation Method:
subsections.content: Interest will be calculated based on the actual number of days for which the loan is outstanding, from the date the loan is disbursed to the date it is fully repaid The customer will be allowed to close the loan any time during the tenure of the loan. However, if the customer closes the loan within 15 days of disbursement, he/she will be liable to pay at least 15 days of interest.

subsections.title: Charges & Penalties:
subsections.content: Admin fee: Up to 150 or 0.3% of loan amount + GST (whichever is higher) Sourcing fee: Up to Rs 100 + GST Legal/Recovery charges: Actuals + GST Stamping fee: As applicable Safe custody charges : Rs 5/gram per month (minimum of Rs 5) Penal charges: 30% per annum in case the customer fails to make the bullet repayment on the due date, from the date of default.

subsections.title: Disclaimer:
subsections.content: Terms & Conditions Apply | Interest charged only for days the amount is used | Minimum 15 days applicable

subsections.title: Illustration
subsections.content: For a loan of ₹1,50,000 for 365 days at an APR of 26.90%, the total amount payable is ₹1,90,354 (including interest and applicable charges). | Particulars | Amount | | --- | --- | | Loan Amount | 1,50,000 | | Tenure (days) | 365 | | Base Interest Rate | 24% | | Total Interest | 40,236 | | Total Charges | 118 | | Stamp Duty (if applicable) | 0 | | Processing Fees (including tax) | 118 | | Net Disbursed Amount | 1,50,000 | | Total Amount to be Remitted by Customer | 1,90,354 | | Total Amount Payable (Interest + Charges) | 40,354 | | APR | 26.90% | Minimum loan limit to avail the Chola Welfare loan Scheme: ₹5000/- The interest rate of the scheme is 21 % p.a. (Chola Welfare loan Scheme). A concessional effective interest rate of 3% p.a. is applicable if interest due in the loan account is paid every 30 days till the date of maturity. For more details, please refer to: Privacy Policy: We value your privacy. Your contact information, including your name, email, phone number, and location details, will never be sold to third parties. We use this information to provide updates about our company, share product information, and reach out regarding your inquiries. If you wish to stop receiving communications, you can opt out at any time by clicking the "unsubscribe" link in our emails or by contacting us at the numbers mentioned below.
